theory.technical_interpretation: Technically, synthesis is interpreted through the variables and operators present in the canonical relation. The equation support section should preserve these source equations in sequence so later proof and Wolfram passes operate on the same mathematical object.

reviewed_source_symbols.description: vacuum permeability normalization in the electromagnetic tensor expression.
density matrix or state-density variable in the entry relation.
potential function whose derivatives mark stationary and inflection conditions.

angular frequency or resonance parameter in the local relation.

dictionary_sections.definition: synthesis is a source-backed registry entry whose production form is anchored to the reviewed equation \rho_{TI}:=\frac{\delta\mathbb{K}}{\delta V}. The entry records the mathematical object, condition, or operator named by the title and prepares it for the locked TZPID four-page layout.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: In context, synthesis functions as a local mathematical checkpoint. The canonical equation gives the entry its printable formal spine, while the supporting equations show how the relation is used or constrained inside the surrounding registry arc.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The displayed relation permits the entry to be read as a concrete source-grounded step rather than a registry shell. Its support equations, including \mathcal{H} {GR} = \frac{\hbar^2}{2m {eff}} C_{\mu\nu\rho\sigma} \otimes \psi; \Lambda := \frac{B^2}{\mu_0 \rho \eta \Omega} \sim 1; \text{State} {\Omega} := \lim {t \to \infty} (\text{Volume} {00} \oplus \text{Volume} {01}) \otimes \Psi_{user}, supply the immediate algebraic neighborhood for derivation and review.
dictionary_sections.lemma_support: Lemma support is carried by the reviewed source evidence, the canonical relation, and the equation progression extracted from D:/00_Engine/CSV/TZPID_latex_compile_list.csv.

dictionary_sections.equation_grounding: Equation grounding source: D:/00_Engine/CSV/TZPID_latex_compile_list.csv. The source match provides the canonical equation and its nearby progression equations for this ID.
dictionary_sections.interpretive_role: The interpretive role of synthesis is to make this mathematical condition available as a stable registry node, with dictionary explanation, symbol key, Wolfram form, derivation support, and proof certificate aligned to the same source evidence.
dictionary_sections.tzp_thesaurus: synthesis; source-backed formal relation; reviewed equation-support node; canonical registry formulation.
dictionary_sections.encyclopedia_mathematica: Encyclopedia Mathematica: synthesis should be indexed by its canonical equation, source symbols, and equation-support chain. The entry belongs in the production corpus only with the reviewed formula and supporting relation kept together.
